name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate

draft.notes: 20-card pack: 13 commons, 2-3 non-legendary uncommons, legendary/background slots, 1 non-legendary rare, 1 guaranteed foil, plus an ad card. Always exactly one background card (any rarity); 1-2 legendaries (uncommon/rare/mythic). If Faceless One (special rarity) appears, it is the last common.

sourceNotes: Extra-large Commander draft set with 20-card boosters featuring a guaranteed background card plus legendary creatures/planeswalkers and a guaranteed foil. 24 packs per box. One card of special rarity (Faceless One). Showcase commons appear in the B common run (2 of 8 copies). Printed in Belgium; figures from Belgian Draft Booster Pack Anatomy.
